title: evolvulus linoides
intro: Evolvulus linoides, also known as Blue Daze, is a flowering plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Evolvulus linoides include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. Evolvulus linoides can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is also used topically in the form of a salve or cream to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
